entries: Replaced all previous tasks with the new end-to-end pipeline plan. Prior work (T-001–T-069) archived — all were completed.

items.text: Scrape events from configured sources (Tourism Kelowna, Castanet, etc.)
Post each scraped event to Discord #candidates with approval buttons
On ✅ approval, ingest event to DB as approved_1 with source image attached
Replace grid layout with queue list + full-width edit panel
Edit panel: 1:2 card preview (left) + editable metadata fields (right)
Editable fields: title, venue, city, date, mode, description — auto-populated from scrape
Queue list: clickable sidebar showing all approved_1 events, highlight active

sections.title: 3. Image Fetching (3×3 grid: venue, event, activity)

items.text: Fetch 3 images of the venue/business itself
Fetch 3 images of the specific event
Generate/fetch 3 stock/AI images of the general activity type
Display all 9 as a selectable gallery in the edit panel
User selects one as the static default image
Once static image selected, offer 'Animate' button
Generate animated version (Ken Burns / fal.ai video)
Preview both still and animated in 1:2 viewport
Approve card button — moves event to approved_2 (publish queue)
Calendar grid: 7 columns (Mon–Sun) × 3 rows (Family, Grown-up, Night)
Approved_2 events appear in a sidebar pool for drag-and-drop
Drag events onto calendar slots
Visual progress bar showing slots filled / 21 total
Slot validation: warn if mode mismatch (night event in family slot, etc.)
Publish button enabled once all 21 slots filled (or override available)
On publish: archive current live page as snapshot
Replace homepage cards with new published batch
Confirmation + rollback support
